mapper.sql: s.id, s.student_id, st.name as student_name, s.class_id, c.class_name as class_name, s.subject, s.exam_name, s.score, s.full_score, s.pass_score, s.rank, s.input_user_id, u1.real_name as input_user_name, s.update_user_id, u2.real_name as update_user_name, s.modify_time, s.create_time, s.update_time, s.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM score s LEFT JOIN student st ON s.student_id = st.id LEFT JOIN class_entity c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON s.input_user_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u2 ON s.update_user_id = u2.id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score ( student_id, class_id, subject, exam_name, score, full_score, pass_score, rank, input_user_id, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{classId}, #{subject}, #{examName}, #{score}, #{fullScore}, #{passScore}, #{rank}, #{inputUserId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE score
score = #{score}, rank = #{rank}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, modify_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE score SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO score ( student_id, class_id, subject, exam_name, score, full_score, pass_score, rank, input_user_id, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.studentId}, #{item.classId}, #{item.subject}, #{item.examName}, #{item.score}, #{item.fullScore}, #{item.passScore}, #{item.rank}, #{item.inputUserId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE score = VALUES(score), rank = VALUES(rank), update_user_id = VALUES(input_user_id), modify_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW()
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, ROUND(AVG(score), 2) as avgScore, MAX(score) as maxScore, MIN(score) as minScore, SUM(CASE WHEN score >= pass_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN score >= pass_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) ELSE 0 END as passRate, SUM(CASE WHEN score >= (full_score * 0.9) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as excellentCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN score >= (full_score * 0.9) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) ELSE 0 END as excellentRate FROM score WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND subject = #{subject} AND is_deleted = 0
AND exam_name = #{examName}
